title: Project Operations: New and Existing Projects
description: Create a SceneMax project from the Projects menu, then reopen an existing project and confirm the active workspace.
subject: Project operations
clipFocus: Use File > Projects > New Project, name hello_dragon_tutorial, then use File > Projects to open an existing project.

title: Dragon Hello World
description: Create a folder and script file, then write a Hello World scene that loads the bundled dragon, plays fly, and rotates left.
subject: Dragon Hello World
clipFocus: Create the dragon_scene folder, add a hello_world script, save the runnable main file, and preview the default dragon flying while turning left.

title: Package and Run a Saved Game Executable
description: Package the saved dragon project as a Windows executable, open the output folder, and launch the game.
subject: Package and run executable
clipFocus: Use Package Program, select the Windows target, build the saved game, open the generated folder, and run dragon_scene.exe.

title: Playing 3D Animations
description: Play a bundled animation on a 3D model and control its speed.
subject: Playing 3D Animations
clipFocus: Use s.Dance to play the Dance animation on a Sinbad model, then use a speed value to make the animation slower or faster.
